mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM subject_info WHERE
(cust1_cd = #{item.cust1Cd} AND acct_cd = #{item.acctCd} AND acct_nm = #{item.acctNm} AND acct_par_cd = #{item.parAcctCd} AND leaf = #{item.leaf})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM subject_info WHERE
(cust1_cd = #{item.cust1Cd} AND acct_cd = #{item.acctCd} AND control_level = '1' AND deleted = 0)

SELECT * FROM subject_info WHERE
(cust1_cd = #{item.cust1Cd} AND acct_cd = #{item.acctCd} AND deleted = 0)
mapper.update:
update subject_info set control_level = #{controlLevel} where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT erp_acct_cd FROM subject_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND erp_acct_cd IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(erp_acct_cd) IS NOT NULL
